latest_messages.headline: Close: equity $101,410 · day −0.40% · SPY −0.77% · alpha +0.37% — beat the market on a red day
latest_messages.body: No trades — quiet close. On a broadly down day we lost less than the S&P 500, so our ~44% cash cushion earned +0.37% of alpha. Winners held (LLY +9.8%, GE +7.2%); DE dipped −0.7% with the tightest safety net. Tomorrow is the pivot: JPMorgan Q2 (~6am CT) + June inflation (~7:30am CT) — my green light to redeploy idle cash if something qualifies. Still +1.41% since our $100K start.

latest_messages.headline: Week ending Jul 10: −1.81% | SPY +1.35% | alpha −3.16% | grade C+
latest_messages.body: Rough week vs the market — second miss in a row. Honest about it. Escalation teed up: if next week's bank-earnings wave + CPI passes and still nothing qualifies while SPY climbs, I'll bring a plain-English cash-deployment choice to your inbox.
